goal: Consolidate RF keyword and extraction hardcoding that is shared by client and server while preserving deterministic Local Engine behavior.

steps.name: hardcode-inventory
steps.summary: Documented which RF hardcoded conditions are acceptable and which should be moved or consolidated.

steps.name: shared-rule-catalog
steps.summary: Added a shared deterministic RF rule catalog for intent detection, core signature extraction, and local fallback classification.

steps.name: client-server-consumers
steps.summary: Connected Home intent routing, client Local Engine extraction, and server local LLM fallback to the shared RF rule catalog.

steps.name: verification-and-record
steps.summary: Hardcode consolidation smoke, concept/alias/LLM/evidence smokes, TypeScript, Vite build, server bundle, Harness policy, and whitespace checks passed. Residual risk remains in taxonomy regex and seed Knowledge DB hardcoding.
